scene_input.scene_summary: Abū Bakr decides not to support Misṭaḥ any longer
scene_input.key_visual_action: Abū Bakr crosses his arms, a firm expression on his face
scene_input.setting: A desert oasis or a meeting place

schema_output.scene_summary: Abū Bakr decides not to support Misṭaḥ any longer
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 211
schema_output.moral_lesson: Standing up for what is right, even if it's difficult

characters.name: Abū Bakr
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a plain brown woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white cloth head covering, firm expression on his face

characters.name: Misṭaḥibn Athāthah
characters.appearance: slender build, wearing a dark-colored thobe and a turban

schema_output.narrative_text: Abū Bakr looked at Misṭaḥ with a firm expression. He had decided that he could no longer support him. He crossed his arms, showing that he was not willing to listen to his ideas.

compliance.notes: Historically accurate depiction of a 7th century desert oasis or meeting place

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A serene desert oasis or a meeting place with palm trees and a few rocky outcrops in the background. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the sandy floor. Two figures sit facing each other on a large stone or a low rock, separated by a short distance. On the left, the man in the green cloak seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a plain brown woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white cloth head covering, firm expression on his face, arms crossed and hands clasped together. On the right, a young man seen from the front: slender build, dark-colored thobe and a turban, looking at the man in the green cloak with a mixture of surprise and disappointment, one hand raised in a gentle questioning gesture. Soft warm golden light, calm and reflective mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm sand, beige, and turquoise palette with the white thobe as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'the central figure' -> 'the man in the green cloak'
